import string
import core.io as io

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      in_tok = false
    else
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut state = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    state = state + 1
    if state == 3
      state = 0
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  let name = match state
  when 0
    "Red"
  when 1
    "Green"
  when _
    "Yellow"
  end
  println(name)
end
